# Shashi Kanth G S

Portfolio website for Shashi Kanth G S, Solution Architect specializing in airline domain architecture across Offer, Order, Retailing, distribution modernization, and cloud-native platforms.

## Primary Pages
- Home: https://shashikanth.me/
- Writing archive: https://shashikanth.me/blog
- Airline Modernization Architecture: https://shashikanth.me/airline-modernization-architecture
- NDC and ONE Order Transformation: https://shashikanth.me/ndc-one-order-transformation
- Airline Cloud Platform Modernization: https://shashikanth.me/airline-cloud-platform-modernization
- Airline AI Ops and Automation Architecture: https://shashikanth.me/airline-ai-ops-automation

## Writing
- Build a Vendor-Neutral A2A Agent That Works With Any LLM Provider: https://shashikanth.me/blog/vendor-neutral-a2a-agent
- Turn GitHub Copilot into an A2A-Compliant Agent in Under 5 Minutes: https://shashikanth.me/blog/github-copilot-as-a2a-agent
- The Two Rails of Modern AI: How MCP and A2A Power the Next Generation of Agent Systems: https://shashikanth.me/blog/two-rails-of-modern-ai
- The Missing Piece for AI-Assisted Infrastructure Management: https://shashikanth.me/blog/ai-assisted-infrastructure-management
